title: Bulk Operations & Import
summary: Implement bulk operations and data import functionality for the Abschussplan WordPress plugin, including CSV/Excel import with column mapping, preview/validation, bulk updates, batch deletion, and undo capability.

phases.name: Core Import Infrastructure
phases.description: Build the foundation for file upload, parsing, and data handling

subtasks.title: Create Import Service Class
subtasks.description: Create AHGMH_Import_Service class with methods for file upload handling, CSV/Excel parsing, and data extraction. Support UTF-8/UTF-16 encoding detection and handle German Excel exports with semicolon delimiters.
acceptance_criteria: Can parse CSV files with comma and semicolon delimiters
Can parse Excel .xlsx files using PhpSpreadsheet or similar
Handles UTF-8 BOM and encoding properly
Extracts column headers and data rows
Returns structured array with headers and data
subtasks.notes: AHGMH_Import_Service class created with comprehensive file upload handling, CSV/Excel parsing, UTF-8/UTF-16 encoding detection, and German Excel semicolon delimiter support. All acceptance criteria met. Already committed in b1f23a8.

subtasks.title: Create Import Controller Class
subtasks.description: Create AHGMH_Import_Controller with AJAX handlers for file upload, column mapping submission, preview generation, and import execution. Follow existing controller patterns.
acceptance_criteria: ajax_upload_file handles multipart file uploads securely
ajax_get_preview returns sample data with detected columns
All handlers verify nonce and user capability
Proper error handling with translatable messages
subtasks.notes: AHGMH_Import_Controller class created with complete AJAX handler implementation. All acceptance criteria met: ajax_upload_file handles multipart file uploads with security validation, ajax_get_preview returns sample data with detected columns (up to 20 rows max), ajax_execute_import processes column mapping and imports data to database. Security: All handlers use verify_ajax_request() for nonce/capability verification. Error handling: Comprehensive try-catch blocks with translatable German messages. Features: Duplicate WUS detection, date format parsing, input sanitization, automatic file cleanup. Already committed in 7e288a0.

subtasks.title: Integrate Import Controller into Plugin
subtasks.description: Register the import controller in the main plugin file and ensure it loads properly in admin context.
acceptance_criteria: No PHP errors on admin load
subtasks.notes: Import controller is fully integrated in abschussplan-hgmh.php. Verification confirms: 1) Controller file included at line 64, 2) Controller instantiated at line 163 inside is_admin() context, 3) AJAX handlers registered via constructor (wp_ajax_ahgmh_upload_file, wp_ajax_ahgmh_get_preview, wp_ajax_ahgmh_execute_import), 4) All dependencies loaded in correct order (service before controller), 5) No PHP errors. Integration was completed in previous session (commit d3d7fbf). All acceptance criteria met.

phases.name: Column Mapping System
phases.description: Implement intelligent column mapping with auto-detection and manual override

subtasks.title: Create Column Mapping Service
subtasks.description: Create service for column mapping logic including auto-detection based on header names and data patterns. Support German column names (Datum, Wildart, Kategorie, Meldegruppe, Jagdbezirk, WUS-Nummer, Bemerkung).
acceptance_criteria: Identifies date, number, and text columns by data patterns
subtasks.notes: AHGMH_Column_Mapper class fully implemented with comprehensive auto-detection logic. All acceptance criteria met: 1) Auto-detects common German column names (Datum, Wildart, Kategorie, Meldegruppe, Jagdbezirk, WUS-Nummer, Bemerkung) with extensive variation matching. 2) Matches variations using normalized string comparison, exact/contains matching, and Levenshtein similarity. 3) Identifies date, number, and text columns through pattern analysis of sample data. 4) Returns individual and overall confidence scores, weighted by field importance (required fields weighted 2x). 5) Supports manual mapping override via merge_mappings and validate_mapping methods. Additional features: String normalization with umlaut handling, field definitions with labels/types, validation for required fields. Committed in 819d3bc.

subtasks.title: Create LJV Template Detector
subtasks.description: Create specialized detector for Landesjagdverband (LJV) Excel templates used by state hunting associations. Support common formats from Hessen, Bavaria, NRW.
acceptance_criteria: Returns pre-configured column mapping for known templates
Graceful fallback to generic mapping for unknown templates
Logs detected template type for debugging
subtasks.notes: LJV Template Detector successfully integrated into Import Controller. All acceptance criteria met: 1) Identifies LJV template by structure/headers using signature matching with 3 state-specific formats (Hessen, Bayern, NRW) plus generic LJV, 2) Returns pre-configured column mapping for detected templates with field-to-header associations, 3) Graceful fallback to generic Column Mapper for unknown templates, 4) Logs detected template type for debugging when WP_DEBUG enabled. Integration complete with confidence scoring (>0.6 threshold) and comprehensive test fixtures verified. Committed in 864c770.

subtasks.title: Create Import Validator Service
subtasks.description: Create validation service to check imported data against database constraints, check for duplicates (WUS numbers), validate date formats, and ensure required fields are present.
acceptance_criteria: Checks WUS number uniqueness against existing data
Validates date formats and converts to MySQL format
Validates species and categories against configured values
Returns array of errors and warnings per row
subtasks.notes: AHGMH_Import_Validator service fully implemented and committed (cc3533c). All acceptance criteria met: 1) Validates required fields (wildart, kategorie) are mapped and present, 2) Checks WUS number uniqueness against database with caching for performance, 3) Validates date formats (DD.MM.YYYY, ISO, etc.) and converts to MySQL format with fallback, 4) Validates species against configured wildarten and categories against wildart-specific configuration with case-insensitive fuzzy matching, 5) Returns structured array of errors and warnings per row with detailed messages. Additional features: validate_import() for batch validation, meldegruppe validation (warnings only), comprehensive error messages with row numbers, WUS cache reset method for batch imports. Service is integrated in main plugin file at line 49. Already committed in cc3533c.

phases.name: Import UI Components
phases.description: Build the user interface for import workflow

subtasks.title: Create Import View Class
subtasks.description: Create AHGMH_Import_View class to render import interface including file upload form, column mapping interface, and preview table.
acceptance_criteria: Renders file upload dropzone with drag-and-drop
Renders column mapping interface with dropdowns

subtasks.title: Create Import JavaScript Module
subtasks.description: Create JavaScript for import workflow including file upload handling, dynamic column mapping UI, preview updates, and import execution with progress feedback.
acceptance_criteria: Handles file selection and drag-drop upload
Handles errors gracefully with user feedback

subtasks.title: Add Import CSS Styles
subtasks.description: Add CSS styles for import interface including dropzone styling, mapping interface, preview table, and progress indicators. Match existing admin design.
acceptance_criteria: Dropzone has visual feedback for drag states
Column mapping uses clear visual design
Preview table is scrollable and readable
Progress bar matches WordPress admin style

phases.name: Bulk Operations System
phases.description: Implement bulk update, bulk delete, and mass assignment features

subtasks.title: Create Bulk Operations Service
subtasks.description: Create AHGMH_Bulk_Operations_Service with methods for bulk update, bulk delete, and mass field assignment. Implement batch processing for large datasets.
acceptance_criteria: mass_assign_meldegruppe updates meldegruppe for selected records
Processes in batches of 100 to avoid timeouts

subtasks.title: Create Bulk Operations Controller
subtasks.description: Create AHGMH_Bulk_Operations_Controller with AJAX handlers for bulk actions. Include confirmation dialogs and safeguards for destructive operations.
acceptance_criteria: Validates all record IDs before processing
Returns success count and any failures

subtasks.title: Add Bulk Selection UI to Admin Table
subtasks.description: Enhance the existing admin submission table with bulk selection checkboxes and bulk action dropdown menu.
acceptance_criteria: Checkbox column added to submissions table
Bulk actions dropdown with Update/Delete/Assign options

phases.name: Undo System
phases.description: Implement undo capability for bulk operations and imports

subtasks.title: Create Operation Log Table
subtasks.description: Add database table for operation logging that stores operation type, affected records, previous values, and timestamp for undo capability.
acceptance_criteria: Table stores: operation_id, operation_type, user_id, created_at
Related table stores: log_id, record_id, field_name, old_value, new_value
Index on created_at for efficient cleanup

subtasks.title: Create Undo Service
subtasks.description: Create AHGMH_Undo_Service that logs operations before execution and can restore previous state. Implement retention policy to clean old logs.
acceptance_criteria: cleanup_old_logs removes logs older than 30 days

subtasks.title: Create Undo Controller and UI
subtasks.description: Create controller for undo operations and add undo button/notification to admin interface after bulk operations.
acceptance_criteria: Undo notification shown after bulk operations
Undo button available for recent operations

phases.name: Integration & Admin Menu
phases.description: Integrate all components into admin interface

subtasks.title: Add Import Menu Item
subtasks.description: Add 'Import' submenu item to the plugin's admin menu. Link to import page with proper capability checks.
acceptance_criteria: Import menu item visible in admin sidebar
Only shown to users with manage_options
Active state styling when on import page

subtasks.title: Enqueue Import Assets
subtasks.description: Register and enqueue import JS/CSS only on import page. Pass necessary localization data.
acceptance_criteria: Import JS/CSS only loaded on import page
AJAX URL and nonce localized to JS
Field mapping options passed to JS
No conflicts with other admin pages

subtasks.title: Register All New Controllers
subtasks.description: Ensure all new controllers (Import, Bulk Operations, Undo) are properly instantiated and registered in the plugin initialization.
acceptance_criteria: All new service files are included
All new controller files are included

phases.name: Testing & Documentation
phases.description: Test all functionality and document usage

subtasks.title: Create Test CSV/Excel Files
subtasks.description: Create sample test files for import testing including standard CSV, Excel with German formatting, and LJV template samples.
acceptance_criteria: Sample with validation errors for testing

subtasks.title: Manual Integration Testing
subtasks.description: Perform end-to-end testing of import workflow, bulk operations, and undo functionality. Document any issues found.
acceptance_criteria: File upload works for CSV and Excel

subtasks.title: Update Plugin Documentation
subtasks.description: Add documentation for import and bulk operations features to README and inline help.

qa_checklist.item: CSV import with comma delimiter works
CSV import with semicolon delimiter works
Manual column mapping can override auto-detection
Import creates records with correct field mappings
Bulk selection works in admin table
Security: Nonce verification on all AJAX
Security: Capability check on all endpoints
Security: File type validation on upload
Performance: Large import (1000+ rows) handles well

risks_and_mitigations.risk: Large file uploads may exceed server limits
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Implement chunked upload for files >2MB, show clear error messages for server limits

risks_and_mitigations.risk: Excel parsing library adds significant plugin size
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Make PhpSpreadsheet optional, use basic CSV parsing as fallback

risks_and_mitigations.risk: Bulk delete may accidentally remove important data
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Require confirmation, implement undo with 30-day retention
Validate WUS numbers against existing records, preview before commit
